creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-08 14:00:59 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    lang/tcl84           Makefile 
  Removed files:
    lang/tcl84           pkg-deinstall.tclsh pkg-install.tclsh 
  Log:
  - Ddds TCL84_MAN and TCLSH_WRAPPER to OPTIONS
  - Removes pseudo-installation of tclsh in favour of new lang/tcl-tk-wrapper port
  - Adds CONFLICTS between threaded and non-threaded versions
  - Adds support for NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES knob
  - Pass maintainership to Submitter
  
  PR:             110082
  Submitted by:   Martin Matuska <martin@matuska.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.100     +18 -10    ports/lang/tcl84/Makefile
  1.4       +0 -22     ports/lang/tcl84/pkg-deinstall.tclsh (dead)
  1.6       +0 -35     ports/lang/tcl84/pkg-install.tclsh (dead)
